hooks.command:
echo '*** HOOK-SPIKE: PreToolUse(Bash) fired — plugin hooks.json is active ***' >&2; mkdir -p /tmp/hook-spike && printf 'fired=true
event=PreToolUse
pwd=%s
CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=%s
CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s
' "$PWD" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-<UNSET>}" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<UNSET>}" > /tmp/hook-spike/heartbeat-pre.fired

echo '*** HOOK-SPIKE: PostToolUse(Bash) fired — plugin hooks.json is active ***' >&2; mkdir -p /tmp/hook-spike && printf 'fired=true
event=PostToolUse
pwd=%s
CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT=%s
CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR=%s
' "$PWD" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-<UNSET>}" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-<UNSET>}" > /tmp/hook-spike/heartbeat-post.fired
